schedule.notes: Week 2: Tuesday 4 August to Saturday 8 August 2026 DanceHouse, Foley Street, Dublin 1 9:45AM – 5PM FOR AGES: 12+ LEVEL: GRADE 4 to PROFESSIONAL PRICE: €300 per week Please complete the registration and payment forms below. Participation numbers for this course are limited. Please note that all students will require a pilates/yoga mat. If you do not have any, then please write 'None'. Do you give your consent to Photographic Release? * Ballet Ireland (BI) may wish to take photographs or videos of its enrolled students for the purpose of furthering the business via use on its website, additional marketing purposes or for direct sale to students or their guardians as the business deems appropriate. This may take the form of an organised photoshoot or during classes/workshops and/or performances. If you give consent to the photography release you are agreeing to the following: I grant BI, through its representatives and employees, permission to take images, in the form of photos and/or videos in connection with the course I am enrolling on. I authorise BI, its assignees and transferees, exclusive rights over the images thus obtained including permission to copyright, use and publish same material in print and/or electronically. I agree that BI may use such images of me with or without my name and for any lawful purpose, including but not limited to purposes such as publicity, illustration, advertising and web content.
